Eun Jung YEO

PhD candidate, Department of Linguistics, SNU

Home Currently v1.0.0

© 2022. All rights reserved.

About

Hey there! I am a linguist interested in technologies for atypical speech. Here, atypcial speech includes disorder speech (mainly dysarthric speech) and L2 speech. My passion is to build a better world where everyone can convey their messages towards the world.

Brief Bio

  • PhD candiate in Linguistics (Spoken Language Processing) @ Seoul National University, 2021.3 - Current
  • MA in Linguistics (Spoken Language Processing) @ Seoul National University, 2019.3-2021.2
  • BA in Korean Language and Literature, & Psychology @ Yonsei University, 2014.3-2018.2

    • Conferences

    Choi, K.*, & Yeo, E. J.* (2022). Opening the Black Box of wav2vec Feature Encoder. arXiv preprint arXiv:2210.15386.

    Yeo, E. J.* , Choi, K.*, Kim, S., & Chung, M. (2022). Automatic Severity Assessment of Dysarthric speech by using Self-supervised Model with Multi-task Learning. arXiv preprint arXiv:2210.15387.

    Yeo, E. J., Kim, S., & Chung, M. (2022). Multilingual analysis of intelligibility classification using English, Korean, and Tamil dysarthric speech datasets. in Proc. O-Cocosda (Oral, Virtual) (Best Student Paper)

    Yeo, E. J., Choi, K., Kim, S., & Chung, M. (2022). Cross-lingual Dysarthria Severity Classification for English, Korean, and Tamil. in Proc. APSIPA ASC (Oral only)

    Yeo, E. J., Kim, S., & Chung, M. (2021). Automatic Severity Classification of Korean Dysarthric Speech Using Phoneme-Level Pronunciation Features, in Proc. Interspeech (Poster, Virtual)

    Hernandez, A., Yeo, E. J., Kim, S., & Chung, M. (2020, September). Dysarthria Detection and Severity Assessment Using Rhythm-Based Metrics. in Proc. Interspeech (Poster, Virtual)

    Journals

    Yeo, E. J., Kim, S., & Chung, M. (2021). Automatic severity classification of dysarthria using voice quality, prosody, and pronunciation features. Phonetics and Speech Sciences, 13(2), 57-66.

    Awards

    2021 인공지능 데이터 기반 서비스 공모전 '너의 A.Idea가 보여', 최우수상 (‘I can see your A.Idea’ AI data-based service contest 2021, the grand prize)

    2022 언어 교육용 서양어, 아시아어 사용자의 한국어 음성 데이터 활용 해커톤, 은상 (Analysis on L2 Korean speech data from Western and Asian speakers for language education Hackathon 2022, 2nd Place)
